slides.name: Result hero with people
slides.layout: Two-player hero, Dallas left/cyan, Los Angeles right/magenta. Headline centered lower third. Logos small near score, not repeated in margins.
forbidden: logo-only cover if player images are present

slides.name: Balanced final score board
slides.layout: Symmetric split scoreboard. Fill both sides equally with score slab, team label, logo, and small context strip. No extra logo floating on the left margin.
forbidden: duplicate logo in corner or left rail

slides.name: Two-sided top performers
must_include: Jessica Shepard 22 PTS 15 REB 5 AST 2 STL
Paige Bueckers 18 PTS 3 REB 14 AST 1 STL
slides.layout: Two equal columns. Left column Dallas leaders. Right column Sparks leaders. Use small player photos if uploaded. Use logos only as column headers. No giant logo in the margin.
sparks_performers: Kelsey Plum (Los Angeles Sparks): PTS 27, AST 6
Nneka Ogwumike (Los Angeles Sparks): PTS 13, REB 10

slides.name: CTA with filled composition
slides.layout: Strong CTA, but not empty. Use both logos in footer, basketball texture, score echo, and one comment prompt.
forbidden: logo pair only with no context
